2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation for two new feature bits introduced in Linux 7.2: UFFD_FEATURE_RWP and UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC, which enable read-write-protection tracking and in-kernel resolution of RWP faults without notification. It also documents the file-descriptor-level bit 1 << _UFFDIO_SET_MODE, which advertises support for toggling UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC at runtime using the UFFDIO_SET_MODE ioctl.
